description:
The ConvexHullMesh component is used to generate a Convex Hull Mesh using a series of ``Points`` to wrap around.

The ``Points`` field is not editable currently without Mods.

fields.Points: The points in local space this mesh is trying to shrink wrap around.
fields.FlatShading: Whether the geometry should be not smooth.
fields.MinVertexDistance: the distance by minimum 2 ``Points`` can be before they're automatically merged.
